subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, inasmuch as the verses of thy Lord have been sent down unto thee from the Prison. This is of My grace unto thee, that thou mayest be among the thankful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک بما نزلت لک من جهه السجن آیات ربک هذا من فضلی علیک لتکون من الشاکرین
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
